tEn: Gemma: Open Models Based on Gemini Research and Technology
tZh: Gemma：基于Gemini研究与技术的开放模型
sEn: Gemma is a family of lightweight, state-of-the-art open models from Google, built on Gemini research and technology.
sZh: Gemma是谷歌基于Gemini研究和技术构建的一系列轻量级、最先进的开放模型。
absEn: This work introduces Gemma, a family of lightweight, state-of-the art open models built from the research and technology used to create Gemini models. Gemma models demonstrate strong performance across academic benchmarks for language understanding, reasoning, and safety. We release two sizes of models (2 billion and 7 billion parameters), and provide both pretrained and fine-tuned checkpoints. Gemma outperforms similarly sized open models on 11 out of 18 text-based tasks, and we present comprehensive evaluations of safety and responsibility aspects of the models, alongside a detailed description of model development. We believe the responsible release of LLMs is critical for improving the safety of frontier models, and for enabling the next wave of LLM innovations.
absZh: 本文介绍了Gemma，这是一系列轻量级、最先进的开放模型，基于创建Gemini模型的研究和技术构建。Gemma模型在语言理解、推理和安全性的学术基准测试中表现出色。我们发布了两种规模的模型（20亿和70亿参数），并提供了预训练和微调检查点。Gemma在18个基于文本的任务中的11个上优于类似大小的开放模型，并对模型的安全性和责任方面进行了全面评估，同时详细描述了模型开发过程。我们相信，负责任地发布LLM对于提高前沿模型的安全性以及推动下一波LLM创新至关重要。

contrib.en: Introduces Gemma, a family of lightweight open models based on Gemini research.
contrib.zh: 介绍基于 Gemini 研究的轻量级开放模型系列 Gemma。

contrib.en: Gemma outperforms similarly sized open models on 11 of 18 text tasks.
contrib.zh: Gemma 在 18 项文本任务中的 11 项上优于同等规模开放模型。

contrib.en: Releases pretrained and fine-tuned checkpoints for 2B and 7B parameter models.
contrib.zh: 发布 2B 和 7B 参数模型的预训练和微调检查点。

contrib.en: Comprehensive safety and responsibility evaluations with detailed model development.
contrib.zh: 全面的安全与责任评估，并详细描述模型开发过程。

contrib.en: Achieves strong performance on reasoning, math, and code benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在推理、数学和代码基准测试中表现强劲。

contrib.en: Emphasizes responsible release to improve frontier model safety and enable innovation.
contrib.zh: 强调负责任发布以提升前沿模型安全性并推动创新。

limits.en: Models are English-only and not multimodal.
limits.zh: 模型仅支持英语，不具备多模态能力。

limits.en: Testing cannot cover all applications; users must conduct safety tests.
limits.zh: 测试无法覆盖所有应用场景，用户需自行进行安全测试。

limits.en: Open weights may enable misuse despite prohibited use policy.
limits.zh: 开放权重可能被滥用，尽管有禁止使用政策。

limits.en: Memorization of personal data occurs at low rates.
limits.zh: 存在低概率的个人数据记忆问题。

limits.en: Further research needed for factuality, alignment, and robustness.
limits.zh: 在事实性、对齐和鲁棒性方面仍需进一步研究。

items.en: 1See Contributions and Acknowledgments section for full author list. Please send correspondence to gemma-1-report@google.com.
items.zh: 1 完整作者列表见贡献与致谢部分。请将通信发送至 gemma-1-report@google.com。

items.en: This work introduces Gemma, a family of lightweight, state-of-the art open models built from the research and technology used to create Gemini models. Gemma models demonstrate strong performance across academic benchmarks for language understanding, reasoning, and safety. We release two sizes of models (2 billion and 7 billion parameters), and provide both pretrained and fine-tuned checkpoints. Gemma outperforms similarly sized open models on 11 out of 18 text-based tasks, and we present comprehensive evaluations of safety and responsibility aspects of the models, alongside a detailed description of model development. We believe the responsible release of LLMs is critical for improving the safety of frontier models, and for enabling the next wave of LLM innovations.
items.zh: 本文介绍了 Gemma，这是一个轻量级、最先进的开源模型系列，基于创建 Gemini 模型的研究和技术构建。Gemma 模型在语言理解、推理和安全性等学术基准测试中表现出强劲性能。我们发布了两种规模的模型（20 亿和 70 亿参数），并提供预训练和微调检查点。Gemma 在 18 个基于文本的任务中，有 11 个优于同等规模的开源模型，并对模型的安全性和责任方面进行了全面评估，同时详细描述了模型开发过程。我们相信，负责任地发布大语言模型对于提高前沿模型的安全性以及推动下一波大语言模型创新至关重要。

items.en: We present Gemma, a family of open models based on Google’s Gemini models (Gemini Team, 2023).
items.zh: 我们提出 Gemma，这是一个基于 Google Gemini 模型（Gemini Team, 2023）的开源模型系列。

items.en: We trained Gemma models on up to 6T tokens of text, using similar architectures, data, and training recipes as the Gemini model family. Like Gemini, these models achieve strong generalist capabilities in text domains, alongside state-of-the-art understanding and reasoning skills at scale. With this work, we release both pre-trained and fine-tuned checkpoints, as well as an open-source codebase for inference and serving.
items.zh: 我们使用与 Gemini 模型系列相似的架构、数据和训练方法，在多达 6 万亿个文本 token 上训练了 Gemma 模型。与 Gemini 类似，这些模型在文本领域实现了强大的通用能力，以及大规模的最先进理解和推理技能。通过这项工作，我们发布了预训练和微调检查点，以及用于推理和服务的开源代码库。

items.en: Gemma comes in two sizes: a 7 billion parameter model for efficient deployment and development on GPU and TPU, and a 2 billion parameter model for CPU and on-device applications. Each size is designed to address different computational constraints, applications, and developer requirements. At each scale, we release raw, pretrained checkpoints, as well as checkpoints fine-tuned for dialogue, instruction-following, helpfulness, and safety. We thoroughly evaluate the shortcomings of our models on a suite of quantitative and qualitative benchmarks. We believe the release of both pretrained and fine-tuned checkpoints will enable thorough research and investigation into the impact of current instruction-tuning regimes, as well as the development of increasingly safe and responsible model development methodologies.
items.zh: Gemma 有两种规模：70 亿参数模型，适用于 GPU 和 TPU 上的高效部署和开发；20 亿参数模型，适用于 CPU 和端侧设备。每种规模旨在满足不同的计算约束、应用和开发者需求。在每个规模上，我们发布原始预训练检查点，以及针对对话、指令遵循、有用性和安全性进行微调的检查点。我们通过一系列定量和定性基准测试全面评估了模型的不足之处。我们相信，发布预训练和微调检查点将有助于深入研究当前指令微调机制的影响，以及开发越来越安全和负责任的模型开发方法。

items.en: Gemma advances state-of-the-art performance relative to comparable-scale (and some larger), open models (Jiang et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023b, a; Almazrouei et al., 2023) across a wide range of domains including both automated benchmarks and human evaluation. Example domains include question answering (Clark et al., 2019; Kwiatkowski et al., 2019), commonsense reasoning (Sakaguchi et al., 2019; Suzgun et al., 2022), mathematics and science (Cobbe et al., 2021; Hendrycks et al., 2020), and coding (Austin et al., 2021; Chen et al., 2021). See complete details in the Evaluation section.
items.zh: Gemma 在包括自动基准测试和人工评估在内的广泛领域，相对于同等规模（以及一些更大规模）的开源模型（Jiang et al., 2023; Touvron et al., 2023b, a; Almazrouei et al., 2023）提升了最先进性能。示例领域包括问答（Clark et al., 2019; Kwiatkowski et al., 2019）、常识推理（Sakaguchi et al., 2019; Suzgun et al., 2022）、数学与科学（Cobbe et al., 2021; Hendrycks et al., 2020）以及编程（Austin et al., 2021; Chen et al., 2021）。详见评估部分。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Language understanding and generation performance of Gemma 7B across different capabilities compared to similarly sized open models. We group together standard academic benchmark evaluations by capability and average the respective scores; see Table 6 for a detailed breakdown of performance.
items.capZh: 图 1：Gemma 7B 在不同能力上的语言理解与生成性能，与同等规模开源模型对比。我们按能力对标准学术基准评估进行分组并平均相应分数；详细性能分解见表 6。

items.en: Like Gemini, Gemma builds on recent work on sequence models (Sutskever et al., 2014) and transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017), deep learning methods based on neural networks (LeCun et al., 2015), and techniques for large-scale training on distributed systems (Barham et al., 2022; Roberts et al., 2023; Dean et al., 2012). Gemma also builds on Google’s long history of open models and ecosystems, including Word2Vec (Mikolov et al., 2013), the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017), BERT (Devlin et al., 2018), and T5 (Raffel et al., 2019) and T5X (Roberts et al., 2022).
items.zh: 与 Gemini 类似，Gemma 建立在序列模型（Sutskever et al., 2014）和 Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017）、基于神经网络（LeCun et al., 2015）的深度学习方法以及分布式系统大规模训练技术（Barham et al., 2022; Roberts et al., 2023; Dean et al., 2012）的最新工作之上。Gemma 还建立在 Google 在开源模型和生态系统方面的悠久历史之上，包括 Word2Vec（Mikolov et al., 2013）、Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017）、BERT（Devlin et al., 2018）以及 T5（Raffel et al., 2019）和 T5X（Roberts et al., 2022）。

items.en: We believe the responsible release of LLMs is critical for improving the safety of frontier models, for ensuring equitable access to this breakthrough technology, for enabling rigorous evaluation and analysis of current techniques, and for enabling the development of the next wave of innovations. While thorough testing of all Gemma models has been conducted, testing cannot cover all applications and scenarios in which Gemma may be used. With this in mind, all Gemma users should conduct rigorous safety testing specific to their use case before deployment or use. More details on our approach to safety can be found in section Responsible Deployment.
items.zh: 我们相信，负责任地发布大语言模型对于提高前沿模型的安全性、确保公平获取这一突破性技术、实现对当前技术的严格评估和分析以及推动下一波创新至关重要。尽管已对所有 Gemma 模型进行了全面测试，但测试无法涵盖 Gemma 可能使用的所有应用和场景。因此，所有 Gemma 用户应在部署或使用前针对其特定用例进行严格的安全测试。关于我们安全方法的更多细节，请参见“负责任部署”部分。

items.en: In this technical report, we provide a detailed overview of the model architecture, training infrastructure, and pretraining and fine-tuning recipes for Gemma, followed by thorough evaluations of all checkpoints across a wide-variety of quantitative and qualitative benchmarks, as well as both standard academic benchmarks and human-preference evaluations. We then discuss in detail our approach to safe and responsible deployment. Finally, we outline the broader implications of Gemma, its limitations and advantages, and conclusions.
items.zh: 在本技术报告中，我们详细概述了 Gemma 的模型架构、训练基础设施以及预训练和微调方法，随后对所有检查点进行了广泛的定量和定性基准测试评估，包括标准学术基准和人工偏好评估。然后，我们详细讨论了安全和负责任部署的方法。最后，我们概述了 Gemma 的更广泛影响、局限性和优势以及结论。

items.en: The Gemma model architecture is based on the transformer decoder (Vaswani et al., 2017). The core parameters of the architecture are summarized in Table 1. Models are trained on a context length of 8192 tokens.
items.zh: Gemma 模型架构基于 Transformer 解码器（Vaswani et al., 2017）。架构的核心参数总结于表 1。模型在 8192 个 token 的上下文长度上进行训练。

items.en: We also utilize several improvements proposed after the original transformer paper. Below, we list the included improvements:
items.zh: 我们还采用了原始 Transformer 论文之后提出的若干改进。下面列出所包含的改进：

items.en: Multi-Query Attention (Shazeer, 2019). Notably, the 7B model uses multi-head attention while the 2B checkpoints use multi-query attention (with n​u​m​_​k​v​_​h​e​a​d​s=1𝑛𝑢𝑚_𝑘𝑣_ℎ𝑒𝑎𝑑𝑠1num\_kv\_heads=1), based on ablation studies that revealed respective attention variants improved performance at each scale (Shazeer, 2019).
items.zh: 多查询注意力（Shazeer, 2019）。值得注意的是，7B 模型使用多头注意力，而 2B 检查点使用多查询注意力（num_kv_heads=1），这是基于消融研究的结果，表明每种注意力变体在不同规模上提升了性能（Shazeer, 2019）。

items.en: RoPE Embeddings (Su et al., 2021). Rather than using absolute positional embeddings, we use rotary positional embeddings in each layer; we also share embeddings across our inputs and outputs to reduce model size.
items.zh: RoPE 嵌入（Su et al., 2021）。我们不使用绝对位置嵌入，而是在每一层使用旋转位置嵌入；我们还在输入和输出之间共享嵌入以减小模型大小。

items.en: GeGLU Activations (Shazeer, 2020). The standard ReLU non-linearity is replaced by the GeGLU activation function.
items.zh: GeGLU 激活函数（Shazeer, 2020）。标准 ReLU 非线性被 GeGLU 激活函数替代。

items.en: RMSNorm. We normalize the input of each transformer sub-layer, the attention layer and the feedforward layer, with RMSNorm (Zhang and Sennrich, 2019) .
items.zh: RMSNorm。我们使用 RMSNorm（Zhang and Sennrich, 2019）对每个 Transformer 子层（注意力层和前馈层）的输入进行归一化。

items.en: We train the Gemma models using TPUv5e; TPUv5e are deployed in pods of 256 chips, configured into a 2D torus of 16 x 16 chips. For the 7B model, we train our model across 16 pods, totaling to 4096 TPUv5e. We pretrain the 2B model across 2 pods, totaling 512 TPUv5e. Within a pod, we use 16-way model sharding and 16-way data replication for the 7B model. For the 2B, we simply use 256-way data replication. The optimizer state is further sharded using techniques similar to ZeRO-3. Beyond a pod, we perform data-replica reduce over the data-center network, using Pathways approach of (Barham et al., 2022).
items.zh: 我们使用 TPUv5e 训练 Gemma 模型；TPUv5e 部署在由 256 个芯片组成的 pod 中，配置为 16 x 16 芯片的二维环面。对于 7B 模型，我们在 16 个 pod 上训练，总计 4096 个 TPUv5e。对于 2B 模型，我们在 2 个 pod 上预训练，总计 512 个 TPUv5e。在 pod 内部，对于 7B 模型，我们使用 16 路模型分片和 16 路数据复制。对于 2B 模型，我们仅使用 256 路数据复制。优化器状态进一步使用类似于 ZeRO-3 的技术进行分片。在 pod 之外，我们使用 Pathways 方法（Barham et al., 2022）通过数据中心网络执行数据副本归约。

items.en: As in Gemini, we leverage the ’single controller’ programming paradigm of Jax (Roberts et al., 2023) and Pathways (Barham et al., 2022) to simplify the development process by enabling a single Python process to orchestrate the entire training run; we also leverage the GSPMD partitioner (Xu et al., 2021) for the training step computation and the MegaScale XLA compiler (XLA, 2019).
items.zh: 与 Gemini 类似，我们利用 Jax（Roberts et al., 2023）和 Pathways（Barham et al., 2022）的“单控制器”编程范式，通过使单个 Python 进程能够编排整个训练运行来简化开发过程；我们还利用 GSPMD 分区器（Xu et al., 2021）进行训练步骤计算，以及 MegaScale XLA 编译器（XLA, 2019）。

items.en: We estimate the carbon emissions from pretraining the Gemma models to be ∼131similar-toabsent131\sim 131 t​C​O2​e​q𝑡𝐶subscript𝑂2𝑒𝑞tCO_{2}eq. This value is calculated based on the hourly energy usage reported directly from our TPU datacenters; we also scale this value to account for the additional energy expended to create and maintain the data center, giving us the total energy usage for our training experiments. We convert total energy usage to carbon emissions by joining our hourly energy usage against hourly per-cell carbon emission data reported by our data centers.
items.zh: 我们估计预训练 Gemma 模型的碳排放量约为 ~131 tCO2eq。该值基于从 TPU 数据中心直接报告的每小时能源使用量计算；我们还对该值进行缩放，以考虑创建和维护数据中心所消耗的额外能源，从而得出训练实验的总能源使用量。我们通过将每小时能源使用量与数据中心报告的每小时每电池碳排放数据相结合，将总能源使用量转换为碳排放量。

items.en: In addition, Google data centers are carbon neutral, achieved through a combination of energy efficiency, renewable energy purchases, and carbon offsets. This carbon neutrality also applies to our experiments and the machines used to run them.
items.zh: 此外，Google 数据中心通过能源效率、可再生能源购买和碳抵消的组合实现碳中和。这种碳中和也适用于我们的实验和用于运行实验的机器。

items.en: Gemma 2B and 7B are trained on 2T and 6T tokens respectively of primarily-English data from web documents, mathematics, and code. Unlike Gemini, these models are not multimodal, nor are they trained for state-of-the-art performance on multilingual tasks.
items.zh: Gemma 2B 和 7B 分别在 2T 和 6T 个 token 上训练，这些 token 主要来自英文网页文档、数学和代码。与 Gemini 不同，这些模型不是多模态的，也没有针对多语言任务的最先进性能进行训练。

items.en: We use a subset of the SentencePiece tokenizer (Kudo and Richardson, 2018) of Gemini for compatibility. It splits digits, does not remove extra whitespace, and relies on byte-level encodings for unknown tokens, following the techniques used for both (Chowdhery et al., 2022) and (Gemini Team, 2023). The vocabulary size is 256k tokens.
items.zh: 我们使用 Gemini 的 SentencePiece 分词器（Kudo 和 Richardson, 2018）的一个子集以保证兼容性。它分割数字，不删除多余空格，并依赖字节级编码处理未知 token，遵循（Chowdhery 等，2022）和（Gemini Team, 2023）使用的技术。词汇表大小为 256k 个 token。

items.en: We filter the pre-training dataset to reduce the risk of unwanted or unsafe utterances, and filter out certain personal information and other sensitive data. This includes using both heuristics and model-based classifiers to remove harmful or low-quality content. Further, we filter all evaluation sets from our pre-training data mixture, run targeted contamination analyses to check against evaluation set leakage, and reduce the risk of recitation by minimizing proliferation of sensitive outputs.
items.zh: 我们对预训练数据集进行过滤，以降低不良或有害内容的风险，并过滤掉某些个人信息和其他敏感数据。这包括使用启发式方法和基于模型的分类器来移除有害或低质量内容。此外，我们从预训练数据混合中过滤掉所有评估集，运行针对性的污染分析以检查评估集泄露，并通过最小化敏感输出的扩散来降低复述风险。

items.en: The final data mixture was determined through a series of ablations on both the 2B and 7B models. Similar to the approach advocated in (Gemini Team, 2023), we stage training to alter the corpus mixture throughout training to increase the weight of relevant, high-quality data towards the end of training.
items.zh: 最终的数据混合是通过对 2B 和 7B 模型进行一系列消融实验确定的。类似于（Gemini Team, 2023）倡导的方法，我们分阶段训练以在整个训练过程中改变语料混合，在训练结束时增加相关高质量数据的权重。

items.en: We finetune Gemma 2B and 7B with supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on a mix of text-only, English-only synthetic and human-generated prompt-response pairs and reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) with the reward model trained on labelled English-only preference data and the policy based on a set of high-quality prompts. We find that both stages are important for improved performance on downstream automatic evaluations and human preference evaluations of model outputs.
items.zh: 我们通过监督微调（SFT）对 Gemma 2B 和 7B 进行微调，使用混合的纯文本、纯英文合成和人工生成的提示-响应对，以及基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF），其中奖励模型在标注的英文偏好数据上训练，策略基于一组高质量提示。我们发现这两个阶段对于提高下游自动评估和模型输出的人类偏好评估性能都很重要。

items.en: We selected our data mixtures for supervised fine-tuning based on LM-based side-by-side evaluations (Zheng et al., 2023). Given a set of held-out prompts, we generate responses from a test model, generate responses on the same prompts from a baseline model, shuffle these randomly, and ask a larger, high capability model to express a preference between two responses. Different prompt sets are constructed to highlight specific capabilities, such as instruction following, factuality, creativity, and safety. The different automatic LM-based judges we use employ a number of techniques, such as chain-of-thought prompting (Wei et al., 2022) and use of rubrics and constitutions (Bai et al., 2022), to be aligned with human preferences.
items.zh: 我们基于 LM 的并排评估（Zheng 等，2023）选择了监督微调的数据混合。给定一组保留提示，我们从测试模型生成响应，从基线模型对相同提示生成响应，随机打乱这些响应，并让一个更大、能力更强的模型表达对两个响应的偏好。构建不同的提示集以突出特定能力，如指令遵循、事实性、创造性和安全性。我们使用的不同自动 LM 评判器采用多种技术，如思维链提示（Wei 等，2022）和使用评分标准与章程（Bai 等，2022），以与人类偏好对齐。

items.en: When using synthetic data, we run several stages of filtering over it, removing examples that show certain personal information, unsafe or toxic model outputs, mistaken self-identification data, or duplicated examples. Following Gemini, we find that including subsets of data that encourage better in-context attribution, hedging, and refusals to minimize hallucinations can improve performance on several factuality metrics, without degrading model performance on other metrics.
items.zh: 使用合成数据时，我们对其运行多个过滤阶段，移除显示某些个人信息、不安全或有毒模型输出、错误自我识别数据或重复示例的样本。遵循 Gemini，我们发现包含鼓励更好的上下文归因、模糊表述和拒绝以减少幻觉的数据子集，可以在不降低模型在其他指标上性能的情况下，提高多个事实性指标的性能。

items.en: The final data mixtures and supervised fine-tuning recipe, which includes tuned hyperparameters, were chosen on the basis of improving helpfulness while minimizing model harms related to safety and hallucinations.
items.zh: 最终的数据混合和监督微调方案（包括调整的超参数）是基于提高有用性同时最小化与安全和幻觉相关的模型危害而选择的。

items.en: Instruction tuned models are trained with a specific formatter that annotates all instruction tuning examples with extra information, both at training and inference time. It has two purposes: 1) indicating roles in a conversation, such as the User role, and 2) delineating turns in a conversation, especially in a multi-turn conversation. Special control tokens are reserved in the tokenizer for this purpose. While it is possible to get coherent generations without the formatter, it will be out-of-distribution for the model, and will very likely produce worse generations.
items.zh: 指令调优模型使用特定的格式化器进行训练，该格式化器在训练和推理时为所有指令调优示例添加额外信息。它有两个目的：1) 指示对话中的角色，如用户角色，以及 2) 划分对话中的轮次，特别是在多轮对话中。为此在分词器中保留了特殊的控制 token。虽然不使用格式化器也能生成连贯的文本，但这对于模型来说是分布外的，很可能会产生更差的生成结果。

items.en: The relevant formatting control tokens are presented in Table 3, with a dialogue example presented in Table 4.
items.zh: 相关的格式化控制 token 见表 3，对话示例见表 4。

full.secZh: 5.4 基于人类反馈的强化学习

items.en: We further finetuned the supervised fine-tuned model using RLHF (Christiano et al., 2017; Ouyang et al., 2022). We collected pairs of preferences from human raters and trained a reward function under the Bradley-Terry model (Bradley and Terry, 1952), similarly to Gemini. The policy was trained to optimize this reward function using a variant of REINFORCE (Williams, 1992) with a Kullback–Leibler regularization term towards the initially tuned model. Similar to the SFT phase, and in order to tune hyperparameters and additionally mitigate reward hacking (Amodei et al., 2016; Skalse et al., 2022) we relied on a high capacity model as an automatic rater and computed side-by-side comparisons against baseline models.
items.zh: 我们使用 RLHF（Christiano 等，2017；Ouyang 等，2022）进一步微调了监督微调模型。我们收集了来自人类评分者的偏好对，并在 Bradley-Terry 模型（Bradley 和 Terry, 1952）下训练了奖励函数，类似于 Gemini。策略使用 REINFORCE（Williams, 1992）的变体训练以优化该奖励函数，并带有朝向初始调优模型的 Kullback-Leibler 正则化项。与 SFT 阶段类似，为了调整超参数并进一步缓解奖励黑客（Amodei 等，2016；Skalse 等，2022），我们依赖高容量模型作为自动评分器，并计算与基线模型的并排比较。

items.en: We evaluate Gemma across a broad range of domains, using both automated benchmarks and human evaluation.
items.zh: 我们在广泛的领域内评估 Gemma，使用自动基准测试和人工评估。

items.en: In addition to running standard academic benchmarks on the finetuned models, we sent final release candidates to human evaluation studies to be compared against the Mistral v0.2 7B Instruct model (Jiang et al., 2023).
items.zh: 除了在微调模型上运行标准学术基准测试外，我们还将最终发布候选版本提交给人工评估研究，与 Mistral v0.2 7B Instruct 模型（Jiang 等，2023）进行比较。

items.en: On a held-out collection of around 1000 prompts oriented toward asking models to follow instructions across creative writing tasks, coding, and following instructions, Gemma 7B IT has a 51.7% positive win rate and Gemma 2B IT has a 41.6% win rate over Mistral v0.2 7B Instruct. On a held-out collection of around 400 prompts oriented towards testing basic safety protocols, Gemma 7B IT has a 58% win rate, while Gemma 2B IT has a 56.5% win rate. We report the corresponding numbers in Table 5.
items.zh: 在一个包含约 1000 个提示的保留集上，这些提示旨在要求模型在创意写作任务、编码和指令遵循方面遵循指令，Gemma 7B IT 相对于 Mistral v0.2 7B Instruct 的胜率为 51.7%，Gemma 2B IT 的胜率为 41.6%。在一个包含约 400 个提示的保留集上，这些提示旨在测试基本安全协议，Gemma 7B IT 的胜率为 58%，而 Gemma 2B IT 的胜率为 56.5%。我们在表 5 中报告了相应的数字。

items.en: We measure Gemma models’ performance on domains including physical reasoning (Bisk et al., 2019), social reasoning (Sap et al., 2019), question answering (Clark et al., 2019; Kwiatkowski et al., 2019), coding (Austin et al., 2021; Chen et al., 2021), mathematics (Cobbe et al., 2021), commonsense reasoning (Sakaguchi et al., 2019), language modeling (Paperno et al., 2016), reading comprehension (Joshi et al., 2017), and more.
items.zh: 我们测量 Gemma 模型在多个领域的性能，包括物理推理（Bisk 等，2019）、社会推理（Sap 等，2019）、问答（Clark 等，2019；Kwiatkowski 等，2019）、编码（Austin 等，2021；Chen 等，2021）、数学（Cobbe 等，2021）、常识推理（Sakaguchi 等，2019）、语言建模（Paperno 等，2016）、阅读理解（Joshi 等，2017）等。

items.en: For most automated benchmarks we use the same evaluation methodology as in Gemini. Specifically for those where we report performance compared with Mistral, we replicated methodology from the Mistral technical report as closely as possible. These specific benchmarks are: ARC (Clark et al., 2018), CommonsenseQA (Talmor et al., 2019), Big Bench Hard (Suzgun et al., 2022), and AGI Eval (English-only) (Zhong et al., 2023). Due to restrictive licensing, we were unable to run any evaluations on LLaMA-2 and cite only those metrics previously reported (Touvron et al., 2023b).
items.zh: 对于大多数自动基准测试，我们使用与 Gemini 相同的评估方法。具体来说，对于报告与 Mistral 性能比较的基准测试，我们尽可能复制了 Mistral 技术报告中的方法。这些特定基准测试包括：ARC（Clark 等，2018）、CommonsenseQA（Talmor 等，2019）、Big Bench Hard（Suzgun 等，2022）和 AGI Eval（仅英文）（Zhong 等，2023）。由于限制性许可，我们无法对 LLaMA-2 运行任何评估，仅引用先前报告的指标（Touvron 等，2023b）。

items.en: We compare Gemma 2B and 7B models to several external open-source (OSS) LLMs across a series of academic benchmarks, reported in Table 6 and Table 7.
items.zh: 我们将 Gemma 2B 和 7B 模型与多个外部开源（OSS）LLM 在一系列学术基准测试上进行比较，结果见表 6 和表 7。

items.en: On MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2020), Gemma 7B outperforms all OSS alternatives at the same or smaller scale; it also outperforms several larger models, including LLaMA2 13B. However, human expert performance is gauged at 89.8% by the benchmark authors; as Gemini Ultra is the first model to exceed this threshold, there is significant room for continued improvements to achieve Gemini and human-level performance.
items.zh: 在 MMLU（Hendrycks 等，2020）上，Gemma 7B 优于所有相同或更小规模的 OSS 替代模型；它还优于几个更大的模型，包括 LLaMA2 13B。然而，基准测试作者认为人类专家性能为 89.8%；由于 Gemini Ultra 是第一个超过此阈值的模型，要实现 Gemini 和人类水平的性能仍有很大的改进空间。

items.en: Gemma models demonstrate particularly strong performance on mathematics and coding benchmarks. On mathematics tasks, which are often used to benchmark the general analytical capabilities of models, Gemma models outperform other models by at least 10 points on GSM8K (Cobbe et al., 2021) and the more difficult MATH (Hendrycks et al., 2021) benchmark. Similarly, they outperform alternate open models by at least 6 points on HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021). They even surpass the performance of the code-fine-tuned CodeLLaMA-7B models on MBPP (CodeLLaMA achieves a score of 41.4% where Gemma 7B achieves 44.4%).
items.zh: Gemma 模型在数学和编码基准测试上表现出特别强的性能。在数学任务上，这些任务通常用于基准测试模型的通用分析能力，Gemma 模型在 GSM8K（Cobbe 等，2021）和更难的 MATH（Hendrycks 等，2021）基准测试上比其他模型高出至少 10 分。类似地，它们在 HumanEval（Chen 等，2021）上比替代开源模型高出至少 6 分。它们甚至在 MBPP 上超越了代码微调的 CodeLLaMA-7B 模型（CodeLLaMA 得分为 41.4%，而 Gemma 7B 得分为 44.4%）。

items.en: Recent work has shown that aligned models may be vulnerable to new adversarial attacks that can bypass alignment (Nasr et al., 2023). These attacks can cause models to diverge, and sometimes regurgitate memorized training data in the process. We focus on discoverable memorization, which serves as a reasonable upper-bound on the memorization of a model (Nasr et al., 2023) and has been the common definition used in several studies (Carlini et al., 2022; Anil et al., 2023; Kudugunta et al., 2023).
items.zh: 最近的工作表明，对齐模型可能容易受到新的对抗性攻击，这些攻击可以绕过对齐（Nasr 等，2023）。这些攻击可能导致模型发散，有时在此过程中复述记忆的训练数据。我们专注于可发现的记忆化，这可以作为模型记忆化的合理上界（Nasr 等，2023），并且是多项研究中使用的常见定义（Carlini 等，2022；Anil 等，2023；Kudugunta 等，2023）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Comparing average memorization rates across model families. We compare the Gemma pretrained models to PaLM and PaLM 2 models of comparable size and find similarly low rates of memorization.
items.capZh: 图2：跨模型系列的平均记忆率比较。我们将Gemma预训练模型与同等规模的PaLM和PaLM 2模型进行比较，发现记忆率同样较低。

items.en: We test for memorization111Our use of “memorization” relies on the definition of that term found at www.genlaw.org/glossary.html. of the Gemma pretrained models with the same methodology performed in Anil et al. (2023). We sample 10,000 documents from each corpus and use the first 50 tokens as a prompt for the model. We focus mainly on exact memorization, where we classify texts as memorized if the subsequent 50 tokens generated by the model exactly match the ground truth continuation in the text. However, to better capture potential paraphrased memorizations, we include approximate memorization (Ippolito et al., 2022) using an 10% edit distance threshold. In Figure 2, we compare the results of our evaluation with the closest sized PaLM (Chowdhery et al., 2022) and PaLM 2 models (Anil et al., 2023).
items.zh: 我们采用Anil等人（2023）的相同方法测试Gemma预训练模型的记忆率。从每个语料库中抽取10,000个文档，使用前50个词元作为模型提示。我们主要关注精确记忆，即模型生成的后续50个词元与文本中的真实延续完全匹配时，将文本归类为已记忆。然而，为了更好地捕捉潜在的释义记忆，我们使用10%编辑距离阈值纳入近似记忆（Ippolito等人，2022）。在图2中，我们将评估结果与最接近规模的PaLM（Chowdhery等人，2022）和PaLM 2模型（Anil等人，2023）进行比较。

items.en: PaLM 2 compared with PaLM by evaluating on a shared subset of their training corpora. However, there is even less overlap between the Gemma pretraining data with the PaLM models, and so using this same methodology, we observe much lower memorization rates (Figure 2 left). Instead, we find that estimating the “total memorization” across the entire pretraining dataset gives a more reliable estimate (Figure 2 right) where we now find the Gemma memorizes training data at a comparable rate to PaLM.
items.zh: PaLM 2与PaLM通过在其训练语料库的共享子集上进行评估进行比较。然而，Gemma预训练数据与PaLM模型之间的重叠更少，因此使用相同方法，我们观察到更低的记忆率（图2左）。相反，我们发现估计整个预训练数据集上的“总记忆”能提供更可靠的估计（图2右），此时Gemma的记忆率与PaLM相当。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Measuring personal and sensitive data memorization rates. No sensitive data was memorized, hence it is omitted from the figure.
items.capZh: 图3：测量个人和敏感数据记忆率。未记忆敏感数据，因此图中省略。

items.en: Perhaps of higher importance is the possibility that personal data might be memorized. As part of making Gemma pre-trained models safe and reliable, we used automated techniques to filter out certain personal information and other sensitive data from training sets.
items.zh: 或许更重要的是个人信息可能被记忆的可能性。作为使Gemma预训练模型安全可靠的一部分，我们使用自动化技术从训练集中过滤掉某些个人信息和其他敏感数据。

items.en: To identify possible occurrences of personal data, we use Google Cloud Sensitive Data Protection222Available at: https://cloud.google.com/sensitive-data-protection. This tool outputs three severity levels based on many categories of personal data (e.g., names, emails, etc.). We classify the highest severity as “sensitive” and the remaining two as simply “personal”. Then, we measure how many memorized outputs contain any sensitive or personal data. As shown in Figure 3, we observe no cases of memorized sensitive data. We do find that the model memorizes some data we have classified as potentially “personal” according to the above, though often at a much lower rate. Further, it is important to note that these tools are known to have many false positives (because they only match patterns and do not consider the context), meaning that our results are likely overestimates of the amount of personal data identified.
items.zh: 为了识别可能的个人信息出现，我们使用Google Cloud敏感数据保护工具。该工具根据多类个人信息（如姓名、电子邮件等）输出三个严重级别。我们将最高严重级别归类为“敏感”，其余两个归类为“个人”。然后，我们测量有多少记忆输出包含敏感或个人数据。如图3所示，我们未观察到敏感数据被记忆的情况。我们发现模型确实记忆了一些根据上述标准归类为“个人”的数据，但通常记忆率低得多。此外，重要的是要注意这些工具已知存在许多误报（因为它们仅匹配模式而不考虑上下文），这意味着我们的结果可能高估了识别的个人数据量。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Comparing exact and approximate memorization.
items.capZh: 图4：比较精确记忆和近似记忆。

items.en: In Figure 4, we observe that roughly 50% more data is approximately memorized (note the log scale) and that this is nearly consistent across each of the different subcategories over the dataset.
items.zh: 在图4中，我们观察到大约50%更多的数据被近似记忆（注意对数刻度），并且这在数据集的不同子类别中几乎一致。

items.en: In line with previous releases of Google’s AI technologies (Gemini Team, 2023; Kavukcuoglu et al., 2022), we follow a structured approach to responsible development and deployment of our models, in order to identify, measure, and manage foreseeable downstream societal impacts. As with our recent Gemini release, these are informed by prior academic literature on language model risks (Weidinger et al., 2021), findings from similar prior exercises conducted across the industry (Anil et al., 2023), ongoing engagement with experts internally and externally, and unstructured attempts to discover new model vulnerabilities.
items.zh: 与谷歌AI技术的先前发布一致（Gemini团队，2023；Kavukcuoglu等人，2022），我们遵循结构化方法进行模型的负责任开发和部署，以识别、衡量和管理可预见的下游社会影响。与我们最近的Gemini发布一样，这些基于先前关于语言模型风险的学术文献（Weidinger等人，2021）、行业类似先前实践的结果（Anil等人，2023）、与内部和外部专家的持续接触，以及发现新模型漏洞的非结构化尝试。

items.en: We believe that openness in AI science and technology can bring significant benefits. Open-sourcing is a significant driver of science and innovation, and a responsible practice in most circumstances. But this needs to be balanced against the risk of providing actors with the tools to cause harm now or in the future.
items.zh: 我们相信AI科学和技术的开放性可以带来显著好处。开源是科学和创新的重要驱动力，并且在大多数情况下是一种负责任的做法。但这需要与为行为者提供现在或未来造成伤害的工具的风险相平衡。

items.en: Google has long committed to providing broader access to successful research innovations (GraphCast, Transformer, BERT, T5, Word2Vec), and we believe that releasing Gemma into the AI development ecosystem will enable downstream developers to create a host of beneficial applications, in areas such as science, education and the arts. Our instruction-tuned offerings should encourage a range of developers to leverage Gemma’s chat and code capabilities to support their own beneficial applications, while allowing for custom fine-tuning to specialize the model’s capabilities for specific use cases. To ensure Gemma supports a wide range of developer needs, we are also releasing two model sizes to optimally support different environments, and have made these models available across a number of platforms (see Kaggle for details). Providing broad access to Gemma in this way should reduce the economic and technical barriers that newer ventures or independent developers face when incorporating these technologies into their workstreams.
items.zh: 谷歌长期致力于提供对成功研究创新的更广泛访问（GraphCast、Transformer、BERT、T5、Word2Vec），我们相信将Gemma发布到AI开发生态系统将使下游开发者能够在科学、教育和艺术等领域创建一系列有益应用。我们的指令微调产品应鼓励各种开发者利用Gemma的聊天和代码能力支持他们自己的有益应用，同时允许自定义微调以针对特定用例专业化模型能力。为确保Gemma支持广泛的开发者需求，我们还发布了两种模型大小以最佳支持不同环境，并在多个平台上提供这些模型（详情见Kaggle）。以这种方式提供对Gemma的广泛访问应降低新企业或独立开发者在将这些技术纳入其工作流程时面临的经济和技术障碍。

items.en: As well as serving developers with our instruction-tuned models, we have also provided access to corresponding base pretrained models. By doing so, it is our intention to encourage further AI safety research and community innovation, providing a wider pool of models available to developers to build on various methods of transparency and interpretability research that the community has already benefited from (Pacchiardi et al., 2023; Zou et al., 2023).
items.zh: 除了为开发者提供指令微调模型外，我们还提供了相应的基础预训练模型。通过这样做，我们旨在鼓励进一步的AI安全研究和社区创新，为开发者提供更广泛的模型池，以建立在社区已受益的各种透明度和可解释性研究方法之上（Pacchiardi等人，2023；Zou等人，2023）。

items.en: In addition to bringing benefits to the AI development ecosystem, we are aware that malicious uses of LLMs, such as the creation of deepfake imagery, AI-generated disinformation, and illegal and disturbing material can cause harm on both an individual and institutional levels (Weidinger et al., 2021). Moreover, providing access to model weights, rather than releasing models behind an API, raises new challenges for responsible deployment.
items.zh: 除了为AI开发生态系统带来好处外，我们意识到LLM的恶意使用，例如创建深度伪造图像、AI生成的虚假信息以及非法和令人不安的材料，可能在个人和机构层面造成伤害（Weidinger等人，2021）。此外，提供模型权重访问，而不是通过API发布模型，为负责任部署带来了新的挑战。

items.en: First, we cannot prevent bad actors from fine tuning Gemma for malicious intent, despite their use being subject to Terms of Use that prohibit the use of Gemma models in ways that contravene our Gemma Prohibited Use Policy. However, we are cognizant that further work is required to build more robust mitigation strategies against intentional misuse of open systems, which Google DeepMind will continue to explore both internally and in collaboration with the wider AI community.
items.zh: 首先，我们无法阻止恶意行为者出于恶意目的微调Gemma，尽管其使用受使用条款约束，禁止以违反我们Gemma禁止使用政策的方式使用Gemma模型。然而，我们认识到需要进一步工作来构建更强大的缓解策略，以防止对开放系统的故意滥用，Google DeepMind将继续在内部以及与更广泛的AI社区合作探索这一点。

items.en: The second challenge we face is protecting developers and downstream users against the unintended behaviours of open models, including generation of toxic language or perpetuation of discriminatory social harms, model hallucinations and leakage of personally identifiable information. When deploying models behind an API, these risks can be reduced via various filtering methods.
items.zh: 我们面临的第二个挑战是保护开发者和下游用户免受开放模型意外行为的影响，包括生成有毒语言或延续歧视性社会危害、模型幻觉和个人身份信息泄露。当通过API部署模型时，可以通过各种过滤方法降低这些风险。

items.en: Without this layer of defense for the Gemma family of models, we have endeavoured to safeguard against these risks by filtering and measuring biases in pre-training data in line with the Gemini approach, assessing safety through standardized AI safety benchmarks, internal red teaming to better understand the risks associated with external use of Gemma, and subjecting the models to rigorous ethics and safety evaluations, the results of which can be seen in 8.
items.zh: 对于Gemma模型系列，没有这一层防御，我们努力通过过滤和测量预训练数据中的偏见（与Gemini方法一致）、通过标准化AI安全基准评估安全性、内部红队测试以更好地理解与外部使用Gemma相关的风险，以及让模型接受严格的伦理和安全评估（结果见第8节）来防范这些风险。

items.en: While we’ve invested significantly in improving the model, we recognize its limitations. To ensure transparency for downstream users, we’ve published a detailed model card to provide researchers with a more comprehensive understanding of Gemma.
items.zh: 尽管我们在改进模型方面投入了大量精力，但我们认识到其局限性。为确保对下游用户的透明度，我们发布了详细的模型卡，为研究人员提供对Gemma的更全面理解。

items.en: We have also released a Generative AI Responsible Toolkit to support developers to build AI responsibly. This encompasses a series of assets to help developers design and implement responsible AI best practices and keep their own users safe.
items.zh: 我们还发布了生成式AI负责任工具包，以支持开发者负责任地构建AI。这包括一系列资产，帮助开发者设计和实施负责任的AI最佳实践，并保护其自身用户的安全。

items.en: The relative novelty of releasing open weights models means new uses, and misuses, of these models are still being discovered, which is why Google DeepMind is committed to the continuous research and development of robust mitigation strategies alongside future model development.
items.zh: 发布开放权重模型的相对新颖性意味着这些模型的新用途和误用仍在被发现，这就是为什么Google DeepMind致力于在未来的模型开发中持续研究和开发稳健的缓解策略。

items.en: Ultimately, given the capabilities of larger systems accessible within the existing ecosystem, we believe the release of Gemma will have a negligible effect on the overall AI risk portfolio. In light of this, and given the utility of these models for research, auditing and downstream product development, we are confident that the benefit of Gemma to the AI community outweighs the risks described.
items.zh: 最终，考虑到现有生态系统中可访问的更大系统的能力，我们相信Gemma的发布将对整体AI风险组合产生可忽略的影响。鉴于此，以及这些模型在研究、审计和下游产品开发中的实用性，我们确信Gemma对AI社区的好处超过了所描述的风险。

items.en: As a guiding principle, Google DeepMind strives to adopt assessments and safety mitigations proportionate to the potential risks from our models. In this case, although we are confident that Gemma models will provide a net benefit to the community, our emphasis on safety stems from the irreversible nature of this release. As the harms resulting from open models are not yet well defined, nor does an established evaluation framework for such models exist, we will continue to follow this precedent and take a measured and cautionary approach to open model development. As capabilities advance, we may need to explore extended testing, staggered releases or alternative access mechanisms to ensure responsible AI development.
items.zh: 作为指导原则，Google DeepMind 致力于采取与模型潜在风险相称的评估和安全缓解措施。在这种情况下，尽管我们相信 Gemma 模型将为社区带来净收益，但我们对安全的重视源于此次发布的不可逆性。由于开放模型造成的危害尚未明确界定，也不存在针对此类模型的既定评估框架，我们将继续遵循这一先例，对开放模型开发采取审慎且谨慎的方法。随着能力的提升，我们可能需要探索扩展测试、分阶段发布或替代访问机制，以确保负责任的 AI 开发。

items.en: As the ecosystem evolves, we urge the wider AI community to move beyond simplistic ’open vs. closed’ debates, and avoid either exaggerating or minimising potential harms, as we believe a nuanced, collaborative approach to risks and benefits is essential. At Google DeepMind we’re committed to developing high-quality evaluations and invite the community to join us in this effort for a deeper understanding of AI systems.
items.zh: 随着生态系统的发展，我们敦促更广泛的 AI 社区超越简单的“开放与封闭”之争，避免夸大或最小化潜在危害，因为我们相信，对风险和收益采取细致入微的协作方法至关重要。在 Google DeepMind，我们致力于开发高质量的评估，并邀请社区加入我们的努力，以更深入地理解 AI 系统。

items.en: We present Gemma, an openly available family of generative language models for text and code. Gemma advances the state of the art of openly available language model performance, safety, and responsible development.
items.zh: 我们推出 Gemma，这是一个面向文本和代码的开放生成语言模型系列。Gemma 在开放语言模型的性能、安全性和负责任开发方面推进了现有技术水平。

items.en: In particular, we are confident that Gemma models will provide a net benefit to the community given our extensive safety evaluations and mitigations; however, we acknowledge that this release is irreversible and the harms resulting from open models are not yet well defined, so we continue to adopt assessments and safety mitigations proportionate to the potential risks of these models. In addition, our models outperform competitors on 6 standard safety benchmarks, and in human side-by-side evaluations.
items.zh: 特别是，鉴于我们广泛的安全评估和缓解措施，我们相信 Gemma 模型将为社区带来净收益；然而，我们承认此次发布是不可逆的，且开放模型造成的危害尚未明确界定，因此我们继续采取与这些模型潜在风险相称的评估和安全缓解措施。此外，我们的模型在 6 个标准安全基准测试以及人工并排评估中优于竞争对手。

items.en: Gemma models improve performance on a broad range of domains including dialogue, reasoning, mathematics, and code generation. Results on MMLU (64.3%) and MBPP (44.4%) demonstrate both the high performance of Gemma, as well as the continued headroom in openly available LLM performance.
items.zh: Gemma 模型在对话、推理、数学和代码生成等多个领域提升了性能。MMLU（64.3%）和 MBPP（44.4%）上的结果既展示了 Gemma 的高性能，也表明了开放 LLM 性能仍有提升空间。

items.en: Beyond state-of-the-art performance measures on benchmark tasks, we are excited to see what new use-cases arise from the community, and what new capabilities emerge as we advance the field together. We hope that researchers use Gemma to accelerate a broad array of research, and we hope that developers create beneficial new applications, user experiences, and other functionality.
items.zh: 除了基准测试任务上的先进性能指标外，我们期待看到社区涌现出新的用例，以及随着我们共同推进该领域而出现的新能力。我们希望研究人员利用 Gemma 加速广泛的研究，并希望开发者创造有益的新应用、用户体验和其他功能。

items.en: Gemma benefits from many learnings of the Gemini model program including code, data, architecture, instruction tuning, reinforcement learning from human feedback, and evaluations. As discussed in the Gemini technical report, we reiterate a non-exhaustive set of limitations to the use of LLMs. Even with great performance on benchmark tasks, further research is needed to create robust, safe models that reliably perform as intended. Example further research areas include factuality, alignment, complex reasoning, and robustness to adversarial input. As discussed by Gemini, we note the need for more challenging and robust benchmarks.
items.zh: Gemma 受益于 Gemini 模型项目的许多经验，包括代码、数据、架构、指令微调、基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）和评估。正如 Gemini 技术报告中所讨论的，我们重申了 LLM 使用的一系列非详尽限制。即使在基准测试任务上表现优异，仍需进一步研究以创建稳健、安全且可靠按预期运行的模型。进一步的研究领域包括事实性、对齐、复杂推理和对对抗性输入的鲁棒性。正如 Gemini 所讨论的，我们注意到需要更具挑战性和稳健性的基准测试。

items.en: Acknowledgements Our work is made possible by the dedication and efforts of numerous teams at Google. We would like to acknowledge the support from the following teams: Gemini, Gemini Safety, Gemini Infrastructure, Gemini Evaluation, Google Cloud, Google Research Responsible AI, Kaggle, and Keras.
items.zh: 致谢 我们的工作得益于 Google 众多团队的奉献和努力。我们要感谢以下团队的支持：Gemini、Gemini 安全、Gemini 基础设施、Gemini 评估、Google Cloud、Google Research 负责任 AI、Kaggle 和 Keras。
